description_fr: Bezos, Musk, Zuckerberg, Bill Gates. Les CEOs et inventeurs qui ont façonné la tech.
description_en: Bezos, Musk, Zuckerberg, Bill Gates. CEOs and inventors who shaped tech.

questions.explanation_fr: Bill Gates et Paul Allen ont fondé Microsoft en 1975 à Albuquerque.
questions.explanation_en: Bill Gates and Paul Allen founded Microsoft in 1975 in Albuquerque.

questions.explanation_fr: Jeff Bezos a fondé Amazon en 1994 dans son garage à Seattle.
questions.explanation_en: Jeff Bezos founded Amazon in 1994 in his Seattle garage.

questions.question_fr: Mark Zuckerberg a fondé Facebook à Harvard.
questions.question_en: Mark Zuckerberg founded Facebook at Harvard.
questions.explanation_fr: Facebook lancé le 4 février 2004 depuis le dortoir de Zuckerberg à Harvard.
questions.explanation_en: Facebook launched February 4, 2004 from Zuckerberg's Harvard dorm.

questions.question_fr: Quelle entreprise Elon Musk dirige-t-il en plus de Tesla ?
questions.question_en: Which other company besides Tesla does Elon Musk lead?
questions.explanation_fr: Elon Musk a fondé SpaceX en 2002. Aussi Neuralink, X (Twitter), xAI, The Boring Co.
questions.explanation_en: Musk founded SpaceX in 2002. Also Neuralink, X (Twitter), xAI, The Boring Co.

questions.question_fr: Qui a inventé le World Wide Web ?
questions.question_en: Who invented the World Wide Web?
questions.explanation_fr: Tim Berners-Lee a inventé le Web en 1989 au CERN, à Genève.
questions.explanation_en: Tim Berners-Lee invented the Web in 1989 at CERN, Geneva.

questions.question_fr: Le co-fondateur de Microsoft, mort en 2018, s'appelait Paul ___.
questions.question_en: Microsoft's co-founder, who died in 2018, was Paul ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Paul Allen est mort le 15 octobre 2018 d'un lymphome.
questions.explanation_en: Paul Allen died on October 15, 2018 from lymphoma.

questions.question_fr: Quel CEO de Twitter / X est connu pour porter du noir ?
questions.question_en: Which Twitter/X CEO is known for wearing all black?
questions.explanation_fr: Jack Dorsey, co-fondateur de Twitter (2006), reconnu pour sa barbe et son look minimaliste.
questions.explanation_en: Jack Dorsey, Twitter co-founder (2006), known for his beard and minimalist look.

questions.question_fr: Le navigateur Mozilla Firefox est open source.
questions.question_en: The Mozilla Firefox browser is open source.
questions.explanation_fr: Firefox, lancé en 2002, est libre et open source via la fondation Mozilla.
questions.explanation_en: Firefox, launched in 2002, is free and open source via the Mozilla Foundation.

questions.question_fr: Quelle plateforme vidéo TikTok appartient-elle à ?
questions.explanation_fr: ByteDance, fondé en 2012 par Zhang Yiming, possède TikTok et Douyin.
questions.explanation_en: ByteDance, founded in 2012 by Zhang Yiming, owns TikTok and Douyin.

questions.question_fr: Quel CEO a popularisé l'iPhone et l'iPod chez Apple ?
questions.question_en: Which CEO popularized iPhone and iPod at Apple?
questions.explanation_fr: Steve Jobs (1955-2011) revenu en 1997 a transformé Apple avec iMac, iPod, iPhone, iPad.
questions.explanation_en: Steve Jobs (1955-2011) returned in 1997 and transformed Apple with iMac, iPod, iPhone, iPad.

questions.question_fr: Le créateur de Bitcoin se cache derrière le pseudonyme Satoshi ___.
questions.question_en: Bitcoin's creator hides behind the pseudonym Satoshi ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Bitcoin a été inventé en 2008 par Satoshi Nakamoto, identité jamais confirmée.
questions.explanation_en: Bitcoin was invented in 2008 by Satoshi Nakamoto, identity never confirmed.

questions.question_fr: Sam Altman dirige OpenAI, l'entreprise derrière ChatGPT.
questions.question_en: Sam Altman runs OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT.
questions.explanation_fr: Sam Altman est CEO d'OpenAI depuis 2019. ChatGPT a été lancé en novembre 2022.
questions.explanation_en: Sam Altman has been CEO of OpenAI since 2019. ChatGPT launched in November 2022.

questions.question_fr: Quelle entreprise a inventé la souris d'ordinateur ?
questions.question_en: Which company invented the computer mouse?
questions.explanation_fr: Inventée par Doug Engelbart au SRI/Xerox PARC dans les années 60-70.
questions.explanation_en: Invented by Doug Engelbart at SRI/Xerox PARC in the 60s-70s.

questions.question_fr: Quelle plateforme de streaming musical a 600+ millions d'utilisateurs ?
questions.question_en: Which music streaming platform has 600+ million users?
questions.explanation_fr: Spotify, fondé en 2006 par Daniel Ek (Suède), a 626 millions d'utilisateurs en 2024.
questions.explanation_en: Spotify, founded in 2006 by Daniel Ek (Sweden), had 626 million users in 2024.

questions.question_fr: Le langage de programmation le plus utilisé pour le data science s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: The most-used programming language for data science is ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Python, créé par Guido van Rossum en 1991, domine le data science et l'IA.
questions.explanation_en: Python, created by Guido van Rossum in 1991, dominates data science and AI.
